mapper.select: SELECT id, phone, nickname, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, phone, nickname, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_user WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (id, phone, nickname, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
